payload.answer: I’m not confident enough to save this Sam note as a durable memory. Could you clarify which Sam you mean and what exactly should be remembered?

entity_resolution.reason: The note about Sam is ambiguous and model confidence is low; cloud escalation is disabled, so no durable memory should be committed without user clarification.

details: Ambiguous Sam note was not saved.

repair_options: Ask the user to identify which Sam the note refers to.
Ask the user to restate the exact fact or preference to save.
Do not commit any memory until clarified.
